rationale: Review 1 would lead to better reuse because it correctly identifies genuinely general lemmas in the diff (`BialgHom.map_antipode`/`antipode_comp` and tensor-product `map_id`/`map_comp`) that are hidden as `private`, so downstream TauCeti code cannot reuse them. Some of its duplicate-specialization cleanup is debatable because base-change-specific simp lemmas can be useful API, but Review 2 misses the material private-helper reuse issue entirely.
